title: potentilla norvegica subsp. monspeliensis
intro: Potentilla norvegica subsp. monspeliensis, also known as the French cinquefoil, is a perennial plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Potentilla norvegica subsp. monspeliensis include its ability to support the immune system and act as an antioxidant, protecting against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
